product_overview: Aegis is an agentic command center for founders that continuously scans project data to detect strategic risks, clusters issues into proposed strategic directions, runs adversarial agent reasoning, and surfaces actionable interventions with controlled execution policies.
core_goals: Continuously detect strategic risks and failure patterns from high-velocity issue data (14-day sliding window).
Automatically cluster related issues into proposed strategic Directions and allow founders to promote them into tracked Bets.
Run adversarial multi-agent reasoning (Product Brain) to synthesize high-quality interventions and reduce hallucinations.
Provide a Mission Control UI with real-time health scoring and signal visibility for proactive oversight.
Enforce Governor guardrails (approval levels, autonomous low-risk execution, Jules gate for code changes) for safe action execution.

features.name: Directions Dashboard
features.description: View discovered strategic themes (Proposed Directions), review clustered evidence, and promote a direction into a tracked Bet by adding a hypothesis.
user_flows: POST /api/linear/scan with workspace_id -> Receive 202 Accepted with scan_id and status 'detecting' -> GET /api/directions/proposed?scan_id={scan_id} -> Receive 200 with list of proposed directions and evidence -> POST /api/directions/{proposed_id}/promote with hypothesis and owner -> Receive 201 Created with bet_id and bet_state 'active'

POST /api/linear/scan with missing workspace_id -> Receive 400 Bad Request with error 'workspace_id required' -> POST /api/directions/{proposed_id}/promote with empty hypothesis -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with error 'hypothesis required'

features.name: Mission Control
features.description: Real-time pipeline visualization showing health score, detected risk signals, and links to proposed interventions for each signal.
user_flows: GET /api/mission-control/health?workspace_id={id} -> Receive 200 with health_score (0-100) and summary_signals -> GET /api/mission-control/signals/{signal_id} -> Receive 200 with risk_details, severity, related_direction_id -> POST /api/interventions with signal_id and proposed_action -> Receive 201 Created with intervention_id (state 'draft')

GET /api/mission-control/health?workspace_id={id} when agent pipeline down -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable with error 'agent pipeline unavailable' -> GET /api/mission-control/signals/{signal_id} -> Receive 404 Not Found when signal is not present

features.name: Intervention Inbox
features.description: List, review, and approve AI-generated interventions; approved interventions are forwarded to the Governor for guardrail checks and potential execution (Linear writes or Jules code changes).
user_flows: GET /api/interventions?status=draft&workspace_id={id} -> Receive 200 with array of interventions (id, summary, risk, recommended_action) -> POST /api/interventions/{intervention_id}/approve with approver_id -> Receive 200 OK with intervention_state 'approved' and next_step 'governor_review' -> POST /api/interventions/{intervention_id}/execute -> Receive 202 Accepted with execution_id when governor allows autonomous execution

POST /api/interventions/{intervention_id}/approve when user lacks permission -> Receive 403 Forbidden with error 'approval_denied' -> POST /api/interventions/{intervention_id}/execute when governor policy is 'require_approval' but approval is missing -> Receive 409 Conflict with error 'governor_requires_approval'

features.name: Directions Dashboard
features.description: View and manage all strategic bets and their progress

features.name: Intervention Inbox
features.description: View and approve AI generated interventions
